overall.description: First-person gameplay footage navigating through a war-torn traditional Japanese temple complex. The player moves from damaged interior spaces across exterior walkways and green tiled rooftops with autumn foliage, eventually entering a modern armory. Atmospheric smoke and overcast skies suggest recent destruction.

segments.scene_description: Navigating narrow interior corridors of a damaged traditional Japanese building. Green roof tiles are visible through breaches in the walls, while wooden floors and paper screens line the path. The atmosphere is tense and exploratory, with debris indicating recent destruction.

segments.scene_description: Moving along an exterior wooden balcony that overlooks severely damaged lower levels. Black smoke rises in the distance while fire damage is visible on nearby structures. The transition from enclosed interior to open exterior reveals the extent of the destruction.

segments.scene_description: Traversing the green ceramic rooftops of the temple complex with expansive views of the surrounding landscape. Vibrant red maple trees contrast against the green tiles and gray smoke-filled sky. The camera moves steadily across the rooflines, revealing distant mountains and additional traditional structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern armory interior with red ambient lighting and weapon displays

smooth contemporary ceiling with recessed lighting panels
illuminated glass cases containing weapons and equipment
ambient red neon lighting creating a dramatic modern atmosphere

segments.scene_description: Entering a starkly modern armory or weapon shop through a window from the traditional rooftop. The interior features red ambient lighting, glass display cases, and weapon racks lining the walls. This creates a dramatic contrast between the ancient exterior and contemporary interior design.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the ruins of a traditional Japanese temple into a starkly modern armory. It begins by navigating narrow interior corridors lined with paper screens and wooden floors, where breaches in the walls first reveal glimpses of green roof tiles. As the camera moves outward, the enclosed space opens onto an exterior wooden balcony overlooking fire-damaged structures and rising plumes of black smoke. The scene then expands across the green ceramic rooftops, gliding past vibrant red maple trees under a gray, smoke-filled sky with distant mountains on the horizon. Finally, the camera transitions from the ancient exterior by entering through a window into a contemporary weapon shop characterized by red ambient lighting and glass display cases.
